name_cn:
Genuine leather
L❤ewe Mini Classic Cowhide Hammock Hobo Handbag Limited Edition for Qixi with Star ⭐ Charm "Deep Purple"
The Hammock Hobo deconstructs the design of a classic bag that can easily change shape, retaining the iconic hammock silhouette to create a stylish, versatile, and ergonomic Hobo bag. This mini version is made of classic cowhide, and the knotted cowhide strap allows for personalization.
Crossbody, shoulder, or handheld
Zipper closure
Cowhide zipper pull
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram Star charm
Model: 1301/730
Dimensions: 28×17×9.5cm
